overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a red-haired character in a dark robe exploring a gothic castle interior. The character walks along an upper balcony, descends a grand staircase, crosses a candlelit hall, and proceeds through a long corridor with green glass ceiling arches.

agents.ego_description: walking along the stone balcony overlooking the grand hall below, then turning toward the staircase

entered.detail: ornate carved stone railing along the balcony edge
large open hall visible below with warm candle lighting and stone pillars
tall gothic stone arches framing the distant hall
lit wall-mounted candle sconces providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an upper stone balcony with ornate railings, overlooking a vast candlelit grand hall below. Gothic stone arches frame the distant view as wall sconces cast warm light on the marble floors.

events.description: descends from the upper balcony into the main hall

agents.ego_description: walking down the wide stone staircase and crossing the main hall floor toward the arched doorway

notable_agents.action: group of dark-robed figures standing near the wall on the right side

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with steps descending to the main floor
tall multi-tiered lamp posts with glowing spherical lights
large stone archway leading to a darker corridor
upholstered white bench against the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character descends the grand staircase into the spacious main hall, passing ornate floor lamps. A group of figures stands to the right as the character approaches a large arched doorway leading to a corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: long corridor with green glass ceiling arches

events.description: enters the narrow corridor through the stone archway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the long corridor toward the distant wooden door, passing wall sconces and benches

entered.detail: narrow brick corridor with high vaulted ceiling and wooden railings
arched stained glass panels in the ceiling emitting green ambient light
heavy dark wooden door with iron fixtures at the corridor end
simple wooden benches along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow, enclosed corridor with distinctive green glass arches in the ceiling casting an emerald glow. Walking steadily past wooden benches and wall sconces, the character approaches the heavy wooden door at the corridor's end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated vantage point in a gothic castle down into a dimly lit, atmospheric corridor. It begins with the character walking along an upper stone balcony with ornate railings, overlooking a vast candlelit grand hall framed by gothic arches. As the character descends the grand staircase, the perspective shifts from the heights of the balcony to the spacious main hall, passing ornate floor lamps and a group of figures. The scene then transitions through a large arched doorway, moving from the open warmth of the hall into a narrow, enclosed corridor. Finally, the lighting shifts to an emerald glow cast by green glass ceiling arches as the character walks past wooden benches toward a heavy wooden door at the corridor's end.
